message:
fix(streaming): handle mutex poisoning gracefully in two-lane executor (bd-2fw)

Replace .expect("lock poisoned") with .unwrap_or_else(|e| e.into_inner())
at all 4 mutex access points in process_window_by_id.  If a bridge
closure panics, the data is recovered from the poisoned mutex instead
of propagating a second panic.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
